message:
fix(tests): correct stream contract violation assertion to match manual-continue retry behavior

Update stream_contract_violation_after_retries_is_fatal test to assert
3 assistant messages (one error message per failed attempt in the manual
continue loop) instead of 0. The previous assertion was incorrect —
each failed stream attempt leaves an error assistant message in the
conversation history before the agent loop terminates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
